- **[Weather.com (The Weather Channel)](https://weather.com/weather/today/l/Dallas+TX)**
- **[AccuWeather](https://www.accuweather.com/en/us/dallas/75201/weather-forecast/331154)**
- **[National Weather Service (NWS)](https://www.weather.gov/fwd/)**

### **Current Weather (Example - Check for Real-Time Data)**
*(Note: Weather changes frequently, so for the most accurate and up-to-date temperature, humidity, and conditions, visit one of the links above.)*

As of my last update, Dallas typically has:
- **Summer (June–August):** Highs around **95–105°F**, lows around **75–80°F**
- **Winter (December–February):** Highs around **50–60°F**, lows around **30–40°F**
- **Spring/Fall:** Mild temperatures, often **70–85°F** during the day.

Would you like a **5-day forecast** or historical averages? Let me know!
